text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions are rising with US strikes on Iran, pushing oil prices higher. This creates market uncertainty and could pressure your tech/chip heavy portfolio.

Your holdings: SOXL (-31.31%) and SPAL (-24.25%) are leveraged ETFs deep in the red, flagged SELL/NEW. QQQI (-1.9%) is near its stop and flagged TRIM. Margin amplifies these drops significantly.

Watch: Keep a close eye on oil price movements and broader market sentiment for any shifts that could impact your highly concentrated tech book.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your leveraged, underperforming positions tightly in this volatile environment.
plays: Consider cutting SOXL given its deep -31.31% loss and 'SELL' status; leveraged ETFs decay and margin amplifies drops.
Respect SPAL's stop at 21.38; this new leveraged ETF is down -24.25% and margin amplifies losses.
Trim QQQI, as flagged, near its 52 stop to protect your income anchor position.
